svg.title: Animated: ratify PM option (a) inside a Gemba walk. Agenda item transitions Active→Decided; next queued item auto-promotes. Loops every 5s.
svg.desc: Cursor moves to the primary "Ratify (a)" CTA, button flashes a green check, an ExecutedAction row fades in, agenda item 3 transitions to Decided, and agenda item 4 auto-promotes from Queued to Active.

g.text: · 23 of 5 decided · started 6m ago by Mike · $0.04 this walk
5 items · 2 decided · 1 active · 2 queued3 decided · 1 active · 1 queued
Ratified: update mk-e6 to Pocket v2
Pocket retired their v1 API last week. Three options I see:
Update mk-e6 to target Pocket v2 — adds ~8k tokens.
Defer mk-e6; focus on Raindrop-only import.
Cancel mk-e6 and file a fresh raindrop_import epic.
My read: (a) keeps scope discipline. I lean (a).
Applied: mk-e6 scope updated to Pocket v2.
This is blocking Stage transition. Security Manager is holding the gate on missing threat-model doc.
Options: ratify + add ADR task · defer until mk-e7 ships · escalate to Architect for perspective.
Click the navy Ratify (a) · ExecutedAction lands · agenda item 3 becomes Decided · item 4 auto-promotes to Active with PM framing.
